subject: Role-based frontend preview pages
fact: Role-based JSP preview pages should reuse src/main/webapp/assets/js/components/mock-role-page.js for session and shell gating, src/main/webapp/assets/js/components/mock-preview-state.js plus WEB-INF/views/partials/preview-state-controls.jspf for ready/loading/empty/error UI, and src/main/webapp/assets/js/components/mock-organizer-utils.js for organizer status grouping instead of duplicating page boot logic.
reason: Future role modules will need the same gated mock-session boot path and preview-state coverage, and this convention prevents duplicate role-specific shell and state logic from spreading again.
